programme.desc: When the ninja learn that Darreth’s Mojo Dojo is to be destroyed and Darreth doesn’t have the money to save it, our heroes enter the annual NinjaBall Run to win its cash prize in order to save the dojo.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninja interrupt Lord Garmadon from using his Mega-Weapon to ‘turn back the clock’ and bring to life the fossils of a monster, the Ninja are accidentally hit and turned into kids.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: The Scorpions and Spiders have set up a tricky trap, and the heroes must free the Legend Beast Eagle and the Bear in a daring mission. Lavertus helps out, using his helicopter. But the Scorpions and Spiders have new vehicles of their own … Speedorz!

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Worriz and Cragger go off on a mission of their own, but get captured by the Spiders. Now it is up to the rest of the heroes to go on one last daring rescue mission.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: In the Scorpion Cave, Laval has been separated from his friends and must overcome his greatest fear to rescue the Lion Legend Beast … or will it rescue him?

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The dream chasers go after their missing memories and the dream chasers try find the Never Witch's hide-out while Phil covers for them at Castle Nocturnia.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The dream chasers feel like they should be taking the fight to the Never Witch instead of training for R.E.M. trials. Zoey's haunted by her most painful memories and Mateo continues to only dream craft Z-Blob-related items.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Set in the past, the dream chaser duo Hannah and Beau argue while young Oz searches for Lunia.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Zoey tries to rebuild a relationship with her estranged dad and Logan steps up his training to beat Astrid.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: A close call with the Never Witch places Mateo in the forests of Wildoria while Beau is on an adventure in the dream world with Zoey.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Zoey and Mateo are trapped in the Grim Realm while Izzie is suspicious of MadTeo's true identity.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Mayor Fleck is running for re-election against R E Fendrich who will stop at nothing to win to use his new power to defeat Sinclair once and for all. When Duke loses his memory, Snake Rattler tricks him into believing he's Snake's criminal henchman.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: When Rooky discovers it's Chief Wheeler's birthday, she is determined to make it memorable. During the dedication ceremony of the city's deep-sea vessel to honor Duke, Freya, and Harl, the ship is accidentally set adrift.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: When the mythical ocean monster, the Quacken, is sighted off the coast, famed adventurer Jessica Sharpe vows to capture it. Rooky and Grizzled go undercover aboard the Guardian of the Oceans in search of a lost pirate treasure.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: A terrified hybrid dinosaur rampages through the park, causing chaos and creating the cover for Danny and Sinjin as they try to steal the Nedry videotape!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: A young park guest accidentally strands himself in the Pteranodon aviary, requiring Owen and a testy Stygimoloch to stage a daring rescue.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Rock star mathematician Ian Malcolm returns to Isla Nublar and helps Claire, Owen, and Hudson deal with strange power surges all over Jurassic World.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: United We Fall
programme.desc: In her match against Cinder, Wyldfyre's temper proves a liability in and out of the arena, and in order to stay in the Tournament, the Ninja invoke an ancient rule that requires them to compete in a race outside of Temple City.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra"

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Sumérgete en la diversión veraniega con Little Angel! Desde compartir en el parque hasta emocionantes visitas al parque acuático, nadar, bailar, acampar, días de playa y aventuras junto al lago, ¡es un verano lleno de alegría y risas!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Little Angel te invita a unirte a sus divertidas aventuras con canciones. Prepárate para cantar, bailar y reír mientras le dan vida a las canciones infantiles clásicas de la forma más divertida.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a Little Angel en un divertido viaje lleno de chapuzones sobre la natación segura.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Acompaña a Little Angel en sus aventuras de juego. Desde la imitación hasta los sustos a la hora de dormir, lavarse las manos, la paciencia, la búsqueda de juguetes, las ovejas sucias y el alegre cucú, ¡es un día de risas y juegos!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels para un baño de burbujas lleno de diversión, donde hacen de cuenta que bañarse es divertido, pero con burbujas es la bonanza de la diversión.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a Little Angel para divertirte al aire libre! Desde payasadas en el patio hasta patinaje, familias de dedos, seguridad en la cama, concientización sobre accidentes y faltar a clase, ¡un día de juegos y seguridad!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a la aventura de aprendizaje de Little Angel! Desde explorar profesiones hasta comprender los sentidos, la alimentación sana, la anatomía y las visitas al médico, ¡cada paso es un descubrimiento de conocimiento y diversión!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a Little Angel para un día de diversión! Desde cantar con globos hasta imitar sonidos de animales, canciones infantiles, partes del cuerpo, citas con el abuelo, sueños de dinosaurios y confiar en el médico, ¡es un día de risas y aprendizaje!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en un viaje lleno de diversión en el que aprenderás a compartir, lo que potenciará la empatía y el sentimiento de cuidado hacia los demás.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a Little Angel en las encantadoras melodías que inspiran dulces sueños y sonrisas.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Acompaña a los Little Angels en un día lleno de aventuras! Desde armar un puesto de limonadas hasta convertirse en princesas, explorar con la araña Itsy Bitsy y disfrutar de fiestas en pijama, ¡cada momento es mágico!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Acompaña a Little Angel en emocionantes aventuras! Desde tomar turnos hasta descubrir el cuerpo, las rutinas antes de dormir, superar enfermedades, la seguridad en la nieve y la diversión en Londres, ¡cada momento trae alegría y aprendizaje!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Prepárate para acompañar a los Little Angels en un día de diversión, aprendizaje y recuerdos inolvidables. Habrá sonrisas, carcajadas y diversión sin fin.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Prepárate para acompañar a los Little Angels en un viaje de coraje y valentía, en el que aprenderán a enfrentarse a nuevos retos con una sonrisa y con confianza.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a Little Angel para divertirte a salvo. Desde "No hables con extraños" hasta "A salvo en la playa", aprende lecciones importantes mientras disfrutas del parque, de los días de playa y las melodías pegadizas.

programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have Pinkerton's unbreakable safe, minus the key. Lupin breaks into the prison where the late Pinkerton was once held and finds the key hidden in his former prison cell. Now the gang has both the safe and key.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: At Fujiko's request, Lupin steals the Hina dolls given to the US Vice President by the Deputy Prime Minister of Japan. However, the doll heist was a trap laid out by Fujiko and her partner, Barracuda.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Goemon pities the young boy who is afflicted with an incurable illness and swears to retrieve his father's painting for him. Will Goemon be able to keep his promise and will Lupin decipher the painting's hidden secret?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The 100-carat blue diamond, known as Hades' Tear is auctioned off at 1 billion dollars along with its accompanying Hades statue to the KL Foundation of Kingsland. Lupin and Jigen make off with Hades' Tear with ease, but they find out it's only glass.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Mexico's richest woman, Madame Tequila owns a black diamond named the Black Pig of Mexico. Realizing that Lupin is after her diamond, Madame Tequila appoints Inspector Zenigata to guard it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal the Ivanov, the Soviet Union's newest atomic submarine from the Port of Arkhangelsk. Lupin becomes entangled in a fierce tug of war between the KGB and CIA when Fujiko decides to sell it to the highest bidder.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #9 Islands of Assasins
programme.desc: The den of the deadly Tarantulas gang, this island is the most dangerous place on Earth… and Lupin's right in the middle of it! A dark mystery haunts his past, and the key to it is on the island.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #10 Tokyo Crisis
programme.desc: When Lupin and his bandit buddies attempt to steal a set of historically significant photographic plates, it turns out they're not the only ones with eyes on the prize in this thievish tale of mayhem and millionaires.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #11 The Columbus Files
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko are after the mysterious treasure known only as Columbus' Egg. Fujiko was able to memorize the Egg's location, but when she's attacked and loses her memory, all seems lost. No one else knows where it is. What's a thief to do?

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #12 Missed by a Dollar
programme.desc: At an auction in New York, attendees are shocked when a mysterious man bids $1,000,000 on a plain diamond ring. The man himself is even more astounded when the President of the World Bank outbids him by a single dollar. The man is Lupin!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata arrives in San Marino after receiving a note from Lupin III. Instead of a declaration of a new theft, it's a wedding invitation.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Marlow Brozzi, a soccer player from San Marino. A mafia member has proof that Brozzi is cheating so Brozzi approaches Lupin for help.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin and the gang managed to steal a fragment of Marie Antoinette's necklace, but Jigen has been captured by Nyx.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A toothache prompts Jigen to rush to a clinic in a ruined town. The doctor, Livia, says she'll only take a look at him if he'll let her hold on to his gun, so he has no choice but to hand it over.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: Veo, veo y no veo claro

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: Aquí se arma la de cantina
programme.desc: Leslie e Isaac se hacen novios. Una discusión provoca que Lizbeth le moje las pestañas a Ali y se desate la guerra. El nuevo ex se lleva la sorpresa de encontrarse con dos ex-amores. Rufas tiene las llaves de la Love Suite.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: Los demonios bailan en la villa
programme.desc: Rufas le rompe el corazón a Carolina. A Jey le toca escena de celos doble. La sala tornado sopla todos los chismes de Brandon. El lobo está enjaulado mientras que Yess le hace piojitos. Una fiesta empieza bien y termina con la llegada de un ex.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: Efectos instantáneos
programme.desc: Yess se dio tragos hasta encontrar el más amargo. Los bandos tratan de encontrar la paz, pero solo tratan. Isaac ya no puede forzar la máquina y termina a Leslie. Unas pócimas mágicas llenas de alcohol hacen efecto inmediato en los influencers.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: ¡Que viva la toxicidad!
programme.desc: Lizbeth y Ali dan los votos a su amor tóxico, mientras que los salvados dan sus votos a la soltería. La Love Suite se abre por última vez con un trío muy caliente.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: 10 influencers llegan a sus vacaciones en el caribe, pero la "Tablet del Karma" les recuerda que deben saldar cuentas con sus Ex. Asaf elige a Lilian para su corazon.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Las advertencias de Valentino se convierten en amenazas. A Alex le regalan un shot, pero en la cara. Llega un nuevo Ex y los celos llenan a la villa de problemas.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Valentino celebra el peor cumpleaños por culpa de la Sala Tornado. Desenmascaran a Queen quien saca su furia. Un Ex cae en una venganza tramada. Dos estrenan la Love Suite. Diana y Fershy arruinan la fiesta peleando y alguien debe partir de la villa.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Fershy decide quien se va, entre Beni y Alba. La Sala Tornado cocina una venganza que los hará tambalear a todos. Lilian explora con Alba y Bryan mientras que Asaf aprovecha con Valeria. En la nueva habitacion hay sorpresas inesperadas.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: El nuevo Ex sorprende entrando por la puerta trasera. Asaf arrastra su corazon por culpa de la indiferencia de Lilian, quien prueba los labios de Bryan y Alba. Ana va a la Love Suite y Aldo aprovecha para destrozar las camas. Un Ex llega acompañado.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Ana recibe a su fantasma más toxico y a Fraag lo "ghostean". El sexo de reconciliacion de Asaf y Lilian dura más que su proxima pelea. Valentino y Alex gritan su amor. Valeria se despide de la Villa. Diana y Chava son la pareja del momento.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Diana se asocia con sus dos amores. El deseo de Queen se cumple pero el precio a pagar por el es caro. Una Love Suite causa polemica. Asaf cae en la tentacion y Lilian elije a Bryan para vengarse. La Sala Tornado revela las mentiras de la Villa.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Yasmila y Asaf están en el ojo del huracán. Valeria aprovecha los estragos y se lleva a Aldo. Asaf y Lilian terminan de nuevo. Los sentimientos de Queen hacen que Ana explote y los de Diana hacen que Chava dude. El nuevo Ex llega interrumpiendo.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.desc: Defensive fortifications span WWI bunkers to futuristic structures; explore submarine bunkers at Lorient housing 20 subs, Churchill's Cabinet War Room, Hitler's Berlin bunker, Cold War shelters, and nuclear weapon protection bunkers.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: All it takes to set off a booby trap is an unsuspecting victim lifting, moving, or disturbing a harmless-looking object; the history of booby traps from the ancient Egyptians, Chinese, Greek, and Romans to the Middle Eastern crisis.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.desc: Jimbei and Shirahoshi are captured by the enemy, and Hordy makes a shocking revelation to the population of Fish-Man Island!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.desc: Shocked by Kazumi's transformation and nearly defeated by the Crusaders, Jun's consciousness begins to fade as she is rescued by Kazumi who has completed her evolution.

programme.desc: Unable to recover from the sorrows of losing Kazumi, Jun quietly stares at the ocean. In her absence, the Beasts led by Crusaders attack the HA base to recover their captured allies.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Heart
programme.desc: It has been six months, Jun exiled herself away from the city and had been living quietly with an elderly couple and their granddaughter.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: God
programme.desc: On the surface, peace seems to have been restored in Tokyo. Beasts still remain captured and are exterminated on a daily basis.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Man
programme.desc: Defeat of Jun at the hands of Lan is witnessed throughout the world. Government leaders hail Lan's victory and proclaims her as child of God who will bring a thousand years of peace.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Beast
programme.desc: Jun Fudo is taken by a mysterious woman and finds herself being attacked by a werewolf-like creature. As she tries to save herself, she transforms into Devil Lady.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Blood
programme.desc: Jun tries to regain some sense of normalcy as she resumes her modeling career but finds herself yet again struggling to come to terms with her true identity.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Wings
programme.desc: A mysterious boy appears in front of Jun one night, proclaiming that he'll kill Jun's lover then disappears in to the darkness. Fearing that Kazumi is in danger, Jun hurries to Kazumi's home.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Embryo
programme.desc: As Jun breaksdown and confess her struggles of being the Devil Lady, Lan Asuka appears once again to take Jun to a military compound.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Shark
programme.desc: Lan informs Jun that Aoi Kurosaki, Jun's old classmate, is possessor of Devil Beast Syndrome and may potentially be Jun's new ally.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Cat
programme.desc: Due to their similiar looks, Hitomi often loses out on her modeling opportunities to Jun. Despite this, Hitomi finds herself attracted to Jun, arising the suspicion that Hitomi may also be another Beast.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Fog
programme.desc: Experiencing her defeat at the hands of Airial, Jun ends up at a local hospital while a deep fog encircles the city. Dismayed by Jun's defeat, Lan commands her to battle the beast once more.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Enemy
programme.desc: Jun is introduced to Dr. Jason Bates who professes his interest in her, both as a woman and as Devil Lady.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Eyes
programme.desc: Jun can't shake off the feeling that she's being watched. All the while, Lan and HA team discover that curious string of murders have been occuring where the victims' eyes have been taken.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Flames
programme.desc: Four year old Remi is miraculously rescued from a fire. Suspecting her to be another Beast, Lan orders for the girl to be further evaluated.

programme.title: Ranma 1/2
programme.desc: Dr. Tofu's mother tries to arrange her son's marriage, but Dr. Tofu doesn't have the heart to tell his mother there's someone else he's interested in.

programme.title: Ranma 1/2
programme.desc: Ranma and Akane are enjoying a parfait at the cafe when a beautiful young girl named Shampoo suddenly appears before them!

programme.title: Ranma 1/2
programme.desc: Shampoo fixes "lunch with love" for Ranma, but inside the lunchbox is P-chan! Then Shampoo challenges the infuriated Akane to a fight.

programme.title: Ranma 1/2
programme.desc: Thanks to Shampoo's Shiatsu technique, Akane has completely forgotten about Ranma's very existence!

programme.title: Ranma 1/2
programme.desc: Ranma and Genma's "training" causes a ruckus. Fed up with his father, Ranma declares that he's going back to China!

programme.title: Ranma 1/2
programme.desc: Visitors drop in at the Tendo Dojo, causing an argument about who gets to adopt Ranma and challenging Akane to battle!

programme.title: Ranma 1/2
programme.desc: Ranma receives a pakcage with a cat inside that hates only Akane and leaves Ranma deathly afraid!

programme.title: Ranma 1/2
programme.desc: Shampoo falls into the "Spring of Drowned Cat" while training in China, blaming her cat transformation on Ranma and demanding that he marry her.

programme.title: Ranma 1/2
programme.desc: Ever since Shampoo's great-grandmother struck Ranma's Full-Body Cat Tongue point, Ranma is unable to change back into a man!

programme.title: Ranma 1/2
programme.desc: A man named Mousse expresses his love for Shampoo, then challenges Ranma to a duel over Akane.

programme.title: Ranma 1/2
programme.desc: Ranma and the others go skiing, and Shampoo's great-grandmother holds a Martial Arts Carry-the-Snowman Race, where the grand prize is Shampoo!

programme.title: Ranma 1/2
programme.desc: The granny at the Cat Café offers to train Ryoga in the mountains, while Ranma, Akane and Genma also begin their training in the mountains!

programme.title: All Purpose Cultural Cat Girl Nuku Nuku (English Dubbed)

programme.desc: Ryunosuke's school friends spot him together with Nuku Nuku, and he tries to trick them into thinking she's his girlfriend.

programme.title: All Purpose Cultural Cat Girl Nuku Nuku (English Dubbed)
programme.desc: Nuku Nuku's lost memories are slowly returning as the young president of Mishima arrives in Maneki City, planning to take over the company division there.

programme.title: All Purpose Cultural Cat Girl Nuku Nuku (English Dubbed)
programme.desc: Nuku Nuku's creator, Dr. Higuchi, was thought dead by everyone until he suddenly appears in front of her!

programme.title: All Purpose Cultural Cat Girl Nuku Nuku (English Dubbed)
programme.desc: As chaos erupts in Maneki City, Dr. Higuchi flees with Nuku Nuku, determined to keep her safe.

programme.desc: Nuku Nuku is now the most popular girl in class! Her classmates all try to get her to join their clubs.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: When a major breakdown threatens to shut down the mine, Claudia and Robin make a risky decision to get desperately needed fuel into camp.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Josh narrowly avoids disaster driving into the mine with a load of fuel and Claudia's devastated when a jade slab cracks in half while she's running the saw.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudia and Robin scramble to find a second jade boulder before their buyer backs out of the deal, but they're running out of time and options.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudia turns to her dad Steve for help when she fears the biggest sale of her mining career is slipping through her fingers.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: With only three survivalists left, the million-dollar challenge comes to an end. The participants face off against below zero temperatures.

programme.title: I Survived . . .
programme.desc: An ordinary Friday at the Seattle headquarters of the Jewish Federation turns nightmarish when a crazed gunman demands an end to the war in Iraq and shoots four workers.

programme.title: I Survived . . .
programme.desc: A single mother is kidnapped, stabbed and left for dead by three hardened criminals and her heroic survival is unforgettable.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: It’s a quiet morning as the expedition face their final day and attempt to cross the Bering Strait. The men try to get fuel from the small native village of Wales. The seas turn huge and the men face their worst fears.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: The men return to the Bering Strait nine months after their first failed attempt to cross into Russian waters. Excitement builds but the weather will not cooperate so the men take refuge in the small native settlement of Wales and wait for their window.

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: On this episode of Americana Outdoors, we take an in-depth look at HiViz Sights. With a simple goal of improving the sport of shooting, whether it's helping you break more targets, harvest more game, or punch more holes in the ten rings,

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: Americana Outdoors takes a look at a number of hunts for whitetail deer and the hunters that pursue them.

programme.desc: Americana Outdoors welcomes Brian Flaherty from Ten Point Crossbows into camp where he'll be showingcasing Ten Point Crossbows and how they cock and uncock easily and then we'll join the winner of Smith and Wesson's Performance Center Giveaway.

programme.desc: Laramy shows his trapping skills as he traps for all sorts of critters near his mountain home.

programme.desc: Four new bladesmiths have their creativity put to the test when they are tasked with making a serrated blade out of only the tools from the table in front of them. They must harvest enough steel to forge the blade.

programme.desc: Steve Austin brings in his toughest group of women yet to compete in Drag Race, Bagged, and Blowout. Only one will earn the right to take on his Skullbuster and a chance to win $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Almost every culture on Earth tells the story of an ancient flood – details vary but the basic plot is the same - An angry God wipes out an unrepentant population.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: The Great Lakes are sometimes referred to as inland seas; they are the largest freshwater system in the world. Naked Science examines the early history of these amazing bodies

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Naked Science follows the story of a diamond from the creation of carbon inside the heart of a dying sun, through to the cutting of a diamond mine in South Africa.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: The earth is 4.5 billion years old and it is slowly dying. Tectonic activity is slowly cooling the planet – the continents will eventually move together to form a new supercontinent called Pangea Ultima.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: First Light
programme.desc: The Hubble Telescope is nearing its end, the replacements are ready to go, ready to peer further back in time and space than can be imagined.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Juno, Cassini and Beyond
programme.desc: The Amazing Cassini spacecraft and its sibling lander, Huygens, have now concluded their scientific studies, bringing back years of data. Now, Juno piercing the cloak of Jupiter and her distant relative New Horizons at the edge of the solar system.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Living with Space
programme.desc: Astronauts and Cosmonauts train and study for years to work and live aboard the International Space Station. With this wealth of experience and insight behind them what do they think when they return to Earth?

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Juno, Cassini and Beyond
programme.desc: The Amazing Cassini spacecraft and its sibling lander, Huygens, have now concluded their scientific studies, bringing back years of data. Now, Juno piercing the cloak of Jupiter and her distant relative New Horizons at the edge of the solar system.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: Two new space telescopes, Gaia and TESS, are in orbit with their primary missions coming to a close. They will be joined by the James Webb Telescope, and together they will open up a whole new vista into time and space.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity keeps us on the ground and the planets in their orbits, yet we only notice it when it's not there. In space we cheat gravity; falling just as fast but missing the ground. Now this fundamental universal force is slowly giving up its secrets.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: The ESA-JAXA joint Bepi-Colombo Mission is moments away from launch. The target is Mercury which has been too long neglected; this mission will shed new light on this strange world of light and dark.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: The commercial space flight companies are edging closer and closer to flight readiness. Paying customers will soon be launching into space; tourist revenue is projected to be a major stepping stone toward space exploration and colonization.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Night Fire
programme.desc: The Northern Lights are more than just beautiful; they tell us about the make up of our planet, our sun, and may even be a signpost for the possibility of life on other planets.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Stargazer's Paradise
programme.desc: The Atacama desert is a perfect place for watching the night sky. With still winds and only a handful of cloudy nights each year, it allows scientists to get the absolute most out of their tools.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hubble's Renaissance
programme.desc: Before we can reach space, we must first be able to see it. Hundreds of years ago, the simple telescope was used to give us a seemingly closer vantage. Today, we use the awe-inspiring, and super powerful, Hubble Space Telescope.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Superscopes
programme.desc: Discover the most powerful telescopes on the planet as they search for the mysteries of the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: The human eye can only see visible light, a small spectrum of electromagnetic waves. Today, we have instruments that let us perceive all wavelengths.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Seasons of Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second largest planet and has an astonishing 60 moons in its orbit. Thanks to the Cassini mission, it’s also one of the most studied and most photographed planets in our neighborhood.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Vesta Unveiled
programme.desc: With the Dawn missions exploration of the asteroid Vesta and the dwarf planet Ceres, asteroids are a hot topic. See what these incredible missions have uncovered.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: They key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity has long been a force that has intrigued scientists. Now, for the first time scientists are probing to detect gravity waves in space as well as mapping the gravity patterns of the moon.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Science and the Shuttle
programme.desc: For more than 25 years the shuttle was our ticket to space, and our laboratory in orbit. Uncover the legacy of this amazing machine, and see what lies ahead.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient skywatchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.desc: When the brilliant but unorthodox scientist Dr. Victor Frankenstein rejects the artificial man that he has created, the Creature escapes and later swears revenge.

programme.desc: Armando ordena un ataque contra los hermanos Reyes, Franco encuentra una oportunidad para revertir la desgracia de su familia después de perder a Rosario. Norma se empeña en olvidar a Juan.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Eduvina no sigue las órdenes de su médico, Franco tampoco calma su euforia y las consecuencias son inevitables. Juan y Óscar quieren irse del pueblo, imaginan a su hermano en una luna de miel.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Malcolm y Carmela humillan a Franco y acusan a Eva de ladrona, ella se entera de que Reyes es dueño de la hacienda y busca a sus hermanos. Juan obliga al viudo de Eduvina a poner todo en su sitio.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Franco le pide ayuda a Juan y a Óscar, su hermano mayor se niega hasta que Eva lo convence para que acepte. Jimena consigue trabajo, Fernando llega con Pepita a la hacienda Elizondo.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers embark on a gut wrenching, 40-foot plunge and teams make a difficult decision when faced with a double U-turn.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams race for a spot in the finale and a high-stakes foot race to the mat will mark the end of one more team's journey.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: As the final three teams race from Shenzhen, China to Santa Barbara, Calif. for the final leg of the Race, they face a gut-wrenching leap of faith.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a brand new twist, all 22 Racers are complete strangers who will meet on the starting line. Before "GO," Racers will immediately compete in a challenge that will determine the order for picking a Teammate, based on nothing but first impressions.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Sao Paulo, Brazil where tensions rise between two teams when one goes back on their word.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers travel to Zanzibar, Tanzania where teams build and deliver desks to a local school. Also, tensions rise when teams face a blind double U-turn, and one team's Race may be in jeopardy when they misplace their passports.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A previously played U-turn causes friction between two teams in Tanzania.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers take on a record setting Roadblock by helping build a 13-story bonfire in Norway.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Several teams come together and target one set of Racers at the double U-turn in Italy.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Venice, Italy where one team reaches a breaking point in a frantic search for a water taxi.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: While driving to the Detour, one team ends up going the wrong way, and a surprising U-turn causes friction between racers.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: An extreme fear of heights paralyzes one Racer at a Roadblock when faced with bungee jumping 240 feet from a bridge into the Corinth Canal.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams battle the scorching heat while transporting shrimp baskets for one mile to a local fisherman, and one Racer approaches their breaking point during the exhausting Roadblock.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams race through Seoul, South Korea to clinch a spot in the finale and a chance to race for the one million dollar prize.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For a price, anything's possible. Contract killings arose out of the need to establish the perfect alibi. By hiring someone else to do the dirty work, a person can deflect guilt, at least in theory.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some of the best clues come from the least likely places. Baffling crimes have been solved and criminals betrayed through evidence provided by insects, beer bottles, and other seemingly meaningless objects.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes, the cause of death does not match the scene of the crime. When an untraceable poison is used to commit murder, homicide detectives turn to forensic toxicologists to follow a killer's tracks and expose a toxic death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They know as much about crime as any crime fighter, or any criminal. They're the crime writers, and through their eyes we see murder most foul.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: CI: Coroner Investigator will reveal the most in-depth look to date into the science of death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At a crime scene, anything left behind or seemingly out of place is considered a clue. But a fire can extinguish everything in its path –challenging forensic investigators at every turn and making each arson a trial by fire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder, at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their undoing.

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol y Morgan son conducidos hasta una comunidad que parece segura y bien abastecida. Todo resulta tan idílico, que la desconfianza ante lo que están presenciando aflora en ellos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Negan mantiene a Daryl encerrado en una celda, pero le propone que se someta a él y pasará a disfrutar de los privilegios de los que gozan los suyos. Se descubre el pasado de Dwight y por qué tiene la cara desfigurada.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Tara llega a un poblado en el que sólo viven unas peligrosas mujeres que no la dejarán salir de ahí fácilmente. Mientras tanto, Heath, quien la acompañaba en la búsqueda de provisiones, se pierde tratando de escapar de un ataque zombi.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carl se separa de Jesus y llega, oculto en un camión, a la guarida de los Saviors con la intención de matar a Negan. Mientras tanto, Rosita fuerza a Eugene a que le fabrique una bala y Michonne pone en marcha su propio plan contra Negan.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: On WOW - Women Of Wrestling, you never know who's going to show up! She's fresh, fly and funktastic — Foxxy Fierce makes her in-ring debut against the cold-hearted dissidentIce Cold — and that's only the tip of the iceberg!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The tag team tournament is underway in a big way as the Monsters of Darkness Siren the Voodoo Doll & Chainsaw battle it out against fan favorites The Bully Busters, Keta Rush & Stephy Slays!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: WOW World Champion The Beast puts her title on the line against the World's Greatest Attorney Sophia Lopez's newest client, Mexican luchador sensation Tormenta!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In a Triple Threat Main Event, WOW World Champion The Beast goes head-to-head-to-head with the Queen of Kings, Reina Del Rey and luchador extraordinaire Tormenta.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In a battle against the odds, the Tonga Twins take on all three of the Heavy Metal Sisters – will the sisters be victorious or, despite being outnumbered, will the Tonga Twins win?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Women Of Wrestling is serving up action-packed tag team action as the Fashionista Family Adrianna Gambino & Gigi Gianni face off against the fiery duo of Miami Sweet Heat, Laurie and Lindsey Carlson.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: Tombstone Territory

programme.title: Tombstone Territory

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sentenced to hang for a holdup murder, Reed Barker meets his fate at the gallows... but when the rope breaks when the trap is sprung, he is freed under Territorial Law. Sheriff Hollister and Editor Claibourne must unravel the mystery.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory

programme.title: Tombstone Territory

programme.title: Tombstone Territory

programme.title: Tombstone Territory

programme.title: Tombstone Territory

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and his guardians are down to their last line of defense as Shada falls victim to Zorc. The Pharaoh desperately wants to summon the three Egyptian Gods, but he can't without his Millennium Puzzle!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Exodia the Forbidden One couldn't defeat Zorc! Exodia was able to buy enough time for the Pharaoh to get his Millennium Puzzle back-he can now summon the almighty Egyptian Gods! It's time for the Pharaoh's counterattack in the biggest brawl.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The three Egyptian Gods have been defeated. The Pharaoh is severely hurt and unable to stop Zorc from setting fire to the city, but our heroes aren't giving up. It's not double vision when Seto and Kaiba transcend time to confront Zorc.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and Kaiba's combined strength couldn't defeat Zorc. Yugi must give the Pharaoh his name, but Yugi doesn't know how to read ancient Egyptian text. All bets are off in the final clash where Yugi must protect the past to save the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pharaoh Atem, Yugi, and friends have defeated the bandit Bakura and Zorc, but the final test still awaits! Yugi must duel Atem! As they set sail to the final dueling grounds, everyone realizes this may be the final night Yugi and Atem have together.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Atem has summoned all three Egyptian Gods! What chance does Yugi have against these powerful creatures that no one has been able to defeat? Yugi better think of a strategy quickly or this duel will be over soon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Atem still has all three Egyptian God Cards, Yugi doesn't have a single monster on the field! Yugi claims that he has a combo that will defeat the Egyptian Gods, but is he simply bragging, or does he actually have a plan?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Atem - more than friends, closer than brothers. Will they stay together, or is it time to say goodbye? It's the final answer, the final duel, and the final time we will see our friends in the rousing conclusion to Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: When the #1 ranked duelist and ruthless tycoon, Seto Kaiba, kidnaps Yugi's Grandpa to get the rare Blue-Eyes White Dragon card, Yugi must face Kaiba in the ultimate Duel Monsters showdown!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is forced to face Duel Monsters creator, Maximillion Pegasus, in the mysterious Shadow Realm where all the monsters and magic are real. If Yugi loses, Pegasus claims Grandpa's soul as his prize!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi gives up one of his own Star Chips so Joey can board the boat bound for Duelist Kingdom and duel to save his sister's eyesight. Meanwhile, the cheat Weevil tries to cripple Yugi's deck by tossing his best cards overboard!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pegasus announces that there are many strange secrets that will make his ultimate tournament unlike any they've ever had. Yugi must not only figure the rules out, but master them if he's to survive!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After Yugi defeats Weevil's first wave of Duel Monsters, he's shocked to discover that Weevil has one last trick up his sleeve; a ravenous Great Moth that grows in power with every turn!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey finds himself courageously accepting a challenge from veteran duelist, Mai. But when Mai begins to demonstrate an unnerving psychic ability, Joey has to figure out Mai's secret strategy before falling victim to it!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The fisherman duelist baits Yugi into a duel on his own sea playing field for a home-field advantage. Can Yugi adapt to these new settings to turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: If Yugi is eliminated from the tournament, KaibaCorp's crooked Board of Directors will transfer control of the company from Kaiba to Pegasus! Kaiba's brother Mokuba challenges Yugi to a duel to protect his brother's company!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi must duel a magical doppelganger of Kaiba, created from the greed and power lust Yugi wiped from Kaiba's soul.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi defeats the Blue Eyes White Dragon, but there are two more waiting in the wings! Will the real Kaiba reach Yugi in time to help beat this impersonator?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey decides to battle Rex Raptor without his friends' help to prove that he is man enough to take care of Serenity on his own.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey duels valiantly, but Rex Raptor has unleashed his secret weapon: the Red-Eyes Black Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's classmate Bakura, possessed by his Millennium Ring's dark powers, traps Yugi and friends in a Shadow Game where they become the cards themselves!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pegasus's hired duelist Panik cheats Mai of all her star chips, and Yugi vows to defeat him and win them back. But when Panik's Castle of Dark Illusions enshrouds his monsters in a black mist, how can Yugi defeat an enemy he cannot see?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Despite his astonishing disadvantage, Yugi boldly provokes Panik - "I'll finish you in three turns." Is Yugi bluffing, or does he have the advantage in this battle of wits?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba descends to the kingdom to face Pegasus. Has Kaiba changed since his battle with Yugi, or is he still the same merciless duelist? A battle between Kaiba's Blue Eyes White Dragon and Joey's Red Eyes Black Dragon holds the answers!

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam accidentally reveals to Carly that she and Freddie shared a secret kiss, Carly confronts them both about why they never told her about it. Meanwhile, Spencer goes to prison to teach an art class to convicts.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie defeat a famous TV chef in a cooking challenge, the chef gives up cooking, quits his show, and refuses to come out of his bedroom. Spencer tries to make his vision of the future a reality.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie accidentally get Principal Franklin fired, Miss Briggs and Mr. Howard take control and enforce harsh rules. Meanwhile, Spencer hires a grizzled old rodeo star to teach him to ride a mechanical bull.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam announces a "take Carly to the dance contest" for an upcoming Girls' Choice dance, so many boys show up that Carly, Sam, and Freddie have to hold a speed-dating session to meet them all.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie agree to make a music video for a pop star who's trying to make a comeback, they discover that she is out of shape and untalented. Spencer has trouble dating a woman when he discovers she's Gibby's mom.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Freddie saves Carly's life, Carly falls in love with him. Meanwhile, Sam and Spencer compete against each other in a paintball game called Assassin.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Gibby discovers Freddie and his girlfriend in a compromising position, he vows revenge and challenges Freddie to a fight. Meanwhile, Spencer's art career really takes off when the local paper incorrectly reports his death.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When the gang discovers that Lewbert was once a happy man engaged to a beautiful woman, they set out to reunite the lost lovers. Spencer joins the building watch to catch a thief that's been stealing from the apartments.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Sam reveals to Carly and Freddie that she used to compete in pageants as a young girl. When she learns that her long-time rival will be competing in Seattle, she convinces Carly to compete against her.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam ends up in jail, Carly and Freddie vow that the web show must go on. They try to enlist Spencer's help at that last minute but he has a date he can't cancel.

programme.desc: Jennette McCurdy, Ariana Grande, Cameron Ocasio, Maree Cheatham and Zoran Korach are on a lunch break from filming “Sam & Cat”; the cast is interrupted by fans of the show.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Sam and Cat promise to buy a doll for a girl if she raises her grades; Sam and Cat are financially strained; Goomer loses his lucky shirt.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: The gang must rescue Cat when she is trapped inside of one of Dice's magic tricks.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Sam and Cat encounter problems when they try a new drone delivery service online.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Sam and Cat are hired to accompany two obnoxious children on a flight to the Bahamas.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Nora targets Dice as a way to get revenge on Sam; Sam and Cat are forced to ask Nevel for help.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: While helping Goomer with a bully at his gym, Sam knocks out an MMA champion.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Sam and Cat try to avoid getting in trouble when they accidentally knock out musician Del DeVille.

programme.title: Victorious: Pilot
programme.desc: After Tori fills in for her ailing sister in a big musical showcase, Tori is asked to enroll at an elite performing arts high school. But once there, Tori struggles to fit in to her new surroundings.

programme.title: Victorious: The Bird Scene
programme.desc: Tori goes all out to master an iconic Hollywood Arts monologue in Sikowitz's class. Meanwhile, André and Robbie join a ballet class to meet girls, with disastrous results.

programme.title: Victorious: Stage Fighting
programme.desc: Tori has to defend herself after Jade claims Tori hurt her in a stage fighting exercise. Meanwhile, Trina has to fend off Robbie's advances when he thinks their stage kiss meant something.

programme.title: Victorious: Beck's Big Break
programme.desc: Tori accidentally gets Beck fired from a small role in a movie, then must figure out a way to get him his job back. Meanwhile, Robbie suffers frightening nightmares about his best friend Rex.

programme.title: Victorious: Tori the Zombie
programme.desc: Tori gets the lead in a high profile school musical, but freaks out when a stage makeup project goes awry, and she's left looking like a zombie on opening night.

programme.title: Victorious: Jade Dumps Beck
programme.desc: After a jealous Jade dumps Beck, she soon regrets it and recruits Tori to help get him back. Meanwhile, Trina puts on a one-woman show and tells Robbie he better give it a good review… or else!

programme.title: Victorious: The Birthweek Song
programme.desc: Tori struggles to find the perfect birthday gift for Trina, then decides to write her sister a song as a present. An ungrateful Trina turns the song into cash by selling it, enraging Tori.

programme.title: Victorious: Robarazzi
programme.desc: Tori suggests Robbie capture videos of students' everyday lives to increase his blog traffic, but when the camera is turned on Tori, she asks him to stop. Only Robbie doesn't and Tori realizes she's created a monster.

programme.title: Victorious: A Film by Dale Squires
programme.desc: When a hot young filmmaker comes to Hollywood Arts, the kids are excited to work on his project. But when the film is released, and they aren't given credit, the kids turn to revenge.

programme.title: Victorious: Rex Dies
programme.desc: As the kids prepare for a big play, Rex is accidentally sucked into a giant fan and Tori is responsible. Robbie is an emotional wreck, and it's up to Tori to save the day by saving Rex's life.

programme.title: Victorious: The Diddly-Bops
programme.desc: Sikowitz recruits the gang to form a children's band for a friend's party. When a leaked video of the group's performance becomes popular, Andre struggles to be taken seriously as a musician.
